data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Post-disaster rescheduling en masse'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Post-disaster rescheduling en masse', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully covered. While the linked use case describes a scenario involving mass rescheduling, it does not provide concrete evidence of the implementation or testing of this functionality. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure or coverage.
gaps: Post-disaster rescheduling en masse functionality is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
